expected.notes: Rule advisory_registered_agent has no conditions so it always fires on track entity; this negative case is structurally entity track but the engine context is empty, preventing evaluation.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_registered_agent', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  (no conditions)
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
